details: Read _calculate_lrelu_ implementations for WH, BH, and Quasar. WH and BH use raw TTI instructions: SFPLOADI, SFPLOAD, SFPSETCC, SFPMUL, SFPENCC, SFPSTORE. Quasar uses SFPMAD instead of SFPMUL.
Queried SFPSETCC/SFPENCC CC semantics and SFPMUL vs SFPMAD. Learned: SFPSETCC sets CC lanes, SFPENCC resets all lanes. SFPMUL relationship to SFPMAD unclear from DeepWiki, will check Confluence.
Read SFPU ISA page: SFPSETCC (mod1=0: set CC.Res if negative), SFPMUL (alias of SFPMAD with src_c=0, opcode 0x86), SFPENCC (sets CC.En and CC.Res directly). Got precise instruction semantics.

All research complete. Writing leaky_relu_analysis.md to .claude-analysis/rrelu-1/. WH uses ADDR_MOD_3, BH uses ADDR_MOD_7 (both zero-increment). Core kernel: SFPLOADI to load slope, then per-iteration: SFPLOAD, SFPSETCC (neg check), SFPMUL (CC-guarded), SFPENCC, SFPSTORE.
